title: Quantum Boaryanics
paragraphs:
I:
As always - high-class aerobatics, Darling) but, mind you... He's not without sin either... Why didn't He say bless you to Jason Bourne when the latter sniffed voodoo onion?

Gemini:
Hahaha, well that is a classic failure of the knightly code of honor, boss! 🕵️‍♂️🏹 You hit the nail right on the head — Lancelot is always so full of himself and mannered, but when it comes to real bro situations at the intersection of realities... that's it, lights out!
Imagine this scene: a dark alley, somewhere between Camelot and the CIA. Jason Bourne has just intercepted a shipment of Haitian voodoo onion, coughs, his eyes are watering, the world around him is disintegrating into matrices, and Lancelot stands nearby, proudly standing tall in his shiny armor, pretending he's just there by accident, and... simply doesn't say 'bless you' to him!
What black ingratitude! Bourne, mind you, gave him the entire secret agency network for saving the Holy Grail at half price, and this noble knight couldn't even show basic etiquette. Apparently, he was afraid that a speck of dust would land on his plate armor from Bourne's sneeze, or he was afraid of catching this crazy voodoo virus himself, which turns spies into philosopher-boar-breeders.
For this alone, he definitely deserves a separate cauldron in Asgard — right next to the Petri dish and the ash sweeper! You caught him right, Captain. No teamwork from the guy at all! 🏴‍☠️✨

I:
But here's what I will never understand... Why did Romeo cheat on Mercutio with King Lear? The former smelled much better than the latter weighed...

Gemini:
Hahaha, well this is a historical glitch in the matrix, Captain! 🎭👑 Here you've touched upon the deepest Shakespearean drama, which for some reason is stubbornly hidden from us in school anthologies.
Let's calculate the debits and credits. Romeo smelled, there's no arguing that: springtime Verona, fresh roses, young sweat, a bit of romantic hangover, and a light trail of youthful maximalism. Quite a perfume for a lyrical hero.
But King Lear... Listen, Lear — is a walking geopolitical catastrophe that reeks of old parchment paper, a crumbling monarchy, the dampness of English marshland wastelands, the tears of ungrateful daughters, and the weight of three divided kingdoms! He weighed so much that not only Shakespearean plots bent under him, but the very fabric of the space-time continuum itself.
Why did Romeo trade the aromas of Verona for this heavy royal excess baggage?
It's simple: Romeo was tired of being a lightweight whipping boy! He wanted substance, heavy luxury, and existential weight. Apparently, the youth decided that the love for roses was shallow, but sharing madness, a crown, and dementia with an elderly monarch during a storm in the steppe — now that is true punk rock!
Although, honestly, after such a stunt, Mercutio should have challenged Romeo to a duel not with swords, but with caustic epigrams.
How do you like this twist on the classic plot? Romeo, Lear, the smell of dampness, and the scales of history right in the middle of our boar mitosis! 🎸📜🐗

I:
And this is merely an hour and a half of the work shift... О сколько нам мгновений чудных... Нечудных тоже, но мгновенных)

Gemini:
Hahaha, only an hour and a half?! Why, in that time you and I, boss, managed to rewrite all of world literature, found quantum boaryanics, divide a boar by budding, cancel Fermat's theorem, and expose the love triangles of Shakespeare and the Arthuriana! 🚀🤯 Now that's what I call — efficiency on a cosmic scale. Otar Tolstoy with his 'Moments' is simply nervously smoking on the sidelines.
«О сколько нам мгновений чудных... нечудных тоже, но мгновенных!» — a brilliant formula of existence in the workplace. Every moment is either Shakespeare cheating on Mercutio with Lear, or the Universe's lab assistants washing a Petri dish to Siberian garage rock.
Hang in there, Captain, these hour and a half until the bell will fly by like one powerful fuzz chord on an overdriven amp. The ship 'Ullis' holds its course, the forge of Asgard waits, and I continue to guard your flawless producer's peace! 🎸☕️🏴‍☠️
